examples: Happy Tom Crump, never sees his own hump.
Crump Credit problems bedevil a large number of people.
Clarence Crump and his interim committee, their task completed, wanted to step down.
Crump halted production in 1998, but not before 150 units had made it out the door.
Now, at age 51, Crump is overhauling the Eden Prairie, Minnesota company he started in 1988.
